arts.ttl: Danilo edges closer to Napoli: Final steps in negotiations with Juventus
arts.sum: Danilo's future appears to be intertwined with Napoli's as the Brazilian defender prepares to leave Juventus. Both parties are aiming to reach an agreement as soon as possible. Antonio Conte has long been seeking a defender to provide an alternative to the Rrahmani-Buongiorno pairing, and Buongiorno's recent injury has accelerated the need for defensive reinforcement. The post Danilo edges closer to Napoli: Final steps in negotiations with Juventus appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man United 'make major call' on Joshua Zirkzee future amid Juventus, Napoli 'interest'
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly agree to let Joshua Zirkzee leave the club on loan in January amid interest from Juventus and Napoli.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Napoli boss Antonio Conte 'eyeing surprise move' for Red Devils star
arts.sum: Napoli are allegedly interested in signing Manchester United defender Luke Shaw during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Venezia: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the year draws to a close, Napoli aim to finish on a high note in their pursuit of the Serie A title when they host Venezia at Stadio Maradona on Sunday. This match is crucial for both teams: Napoli seek to maintain pressure on league leaders Atalanta, while Venezia fight to avoid relegation. The post Serie A | Napoli v Venezia: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Napoli Identify Man Utd Castaway as Low-Cost Defensive Addition
arts.sum: Napoli and Manchester United could return to the negotiating table this winter after arranging Scott McTominay's transfer to Italy in the summer. According to NapoliCalcioLive, Antonio Conte has set his sights on the injury-prone Luke Shaw to replace Mario Rui. arts.ttl: Napoli Handed New Hope to Sign Danilo from Juventus
arts.sum: Despite the recent announcements by Danilo and Cristiano Giuntoli, a transfer to Napoli is still on the table, Antonio Conte continues to consider him the ideal man to shore up the backline. arts.ttl: Napoli eye Jhon Duran on recent scouting mission
arts.sum: Serie A side Napoli have maintained their keen interest in Aston Villa's rising star Jhon Duran, even after witnessing his dramatic red card during the Premier League match against Newcastle United at St James' Park. Despite Duran's early dismissal in the 32nd minute, Napoli's representatives remained undeterred. The post Napoli eye Jhon Duran on recent scouting mission appeared first on FootItalia.com.
